order_notes: White-glove delivery requested for the building freight elevator window.
Call 30 minutes before arrival and confirm dock access with building staff.
Customer requested assembly service and packaging removal.
Deliver after 3 PM due to loading zone restrictions.
Coordinate with front desk for access badge and loading instructions.
Leave packaging labels intact for facilities receiving inspection.

products.name: Harbor Modular Sofa
